name: codecourse-desktop
description: CodeCourse desktop shell for the GitHub project learner.

scripts.desktop:build: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:portable: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.desktop:release: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build && npm run git:ensure && electron-builder --win portable --config.artifactName=CodeCourse-${version}-portable.${ext} && electron-builder --win nsis --config.artifactName=CodeCourse-${version}-setup.${ext}
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=.. .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
